title: aragoa lucidula subsp. lucidula
intro: Aragoa lucidula subsp. lucidula, also known as the 'Yellowroot', is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aragoa lucidula subsp. lucidula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
